basic_details.job_title: SRFTI Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 31 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Satyajit Ray Film & Television Institute (SRFTI), Kolkata
basic_details.short_information: Satyajit Ray Film & Television Institute (SRFTI), Kolkata — a Deemed to be University under Distinct Category, Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, Government of India — has released Advertisement No. SRFTI/RECTT./2026-27/004, dated 12.07.2026, inviting applications from citizens of India for 29 contractual posts at SRFTI, Kolkata and FTII, Itanagar. The posts span Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and technical/production roles such as Broadcast Engineer, Production Manager, Editor, Sound Recordist, Videographer, and Cameraman. This article covers every detail available

application_fee.details: Application fee is Rs. 1,200/- for each post applied for. Fee is to be paid through SBI Collect under the category "Application Fee (Recruitment)". A copy of the payment receipt must be uploaded while submitting the online application form. SC, ST, PWD, and female applicants are exempted from payment of application fees, as per extant GOI practice. Candidates applying for more than one post must pay the fee separately for each post. | Open the link: https://www.onlinesbi.sbi/sbicollect Select category as "Educational Institutions". Select the institution from the list (search for "Satyajit Ray Film and TV Inst"). In the payment category, select "Application Fees (Recruitment)". Fill in the payment details and proceed with payment. Once payment is done, upload the payment confirmation receipt in the application form. Save a digital copy of the payment receipt for future reference.

age_limit.age_details: Contract basis (initially 1 year, extendable by 1 year max)

The table below summarizes the primary/first essential qualification route and minimum experience for each post. Candidates should refer to the full notification for all alternative qualification routes before applying. | Most posts also offer alternative qualification routes based on a Master's degree with slightly higher experience requirements, or a general degree with significantly higher experience requirements (up to 12 years for some Professor posts). These alternative routes, along with "Desirable" qualifications, are detailed in the full official notification and are not repeated in full here to keep this summary scannable.

selection_process: Depending on the number of applications received
eligible shortlisted candidates will be called for a trade test and/or interview
as applicable to the post. Since it is not possible to call all eligible candidates
shortlisting will be done based on criteria fixed by the Institute at the time of scrutiny. The decision of the Institute regarding shortlisting and selection is final and binding.
The notification does not specify separate stages (such as a written exam) beyond trade test and/or interview.
how_to_apply: Apply online through the application portal: https://career.srfti.ac.in
Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,200/- per post via SBI Collect (except SC/ST/PWD/female candidates) and upload the payment receipt.
Complete and submit the online application on or before 03.08.2026, 5:00 PM.
Take a printout of the submitted application along with copies of all requisite documents.
Send/submit the hard copy so that it reaches the following address on or before 10.08.2026, 5:00 PM:
The Registrar, Satyajit Ray Film & Television Institute, EM Bypass Road, Panchasayar, Kolkata – 700094
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application (and separate fee payment) for each post.

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Satyajit Ray Film & Television Institute (SRFTI) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 31 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official SRFTI website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-08-2026. In this article, you’ll find the SRFTI Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form. Download SRFTI Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Below is the complete list of 29 posts advertised, with number of vacancies, institute, consolidated monthly honorarium, and upper age limit, exactly as given in the official notification. Note: Almost all posts have an upper age limit of 63 years. The one exception is Cameraman (Still Photography) at FTII, Itanagar, which has a significantly lower upper age limit of 30 years — candidates should take note of this while checking eligibility.

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Eligibility & Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Each post has detailed essential and desirable qualifications in the official notification, often with 2–3 alternative qualification routes (e.g., a professional degree route vs. a Master's degree route vs. a general-experience route). The table below summarizes the primary/first essential qualification route and minimum experience for each post. Candidates should refer to the full notification for all alternative qualification routes before applying. Most posts also offer alternative qualification routes based on a Master's degree with slightly higher experience requirements, or a general degree with significantly higher experience requirements (up to 12 years for some Professor posts). These alternative routes, along with "Desirable" qualifications, are detailed in the full official notification and are not repeated in full here to keep this summary scannable.

rows.post_category: Assistant Broadcast Engineer / Editor / Sound Recordist / Videographer (EDM)

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee is Rs. 1,200/- for each post applied for. Fee is to be paid through SBI Collect under the category "Application Fee (Recruitment)". A copy of the payment receipt must be uploaded while submitting the online application form. SC, ST, PWD, and female applicants are exempted from payment of application fees, as per extant GOI practice. Candidates applying for more than one post must pay the fee separately for each post. Open the link: https://www.onlinesbi.sbi/sbicollect Select category as "Educational Institutions". Select the institution from the list (search for "Satyajit Ray Film and TV Inst"). In the payment category, select "Application Fees (Recruitment)". Fill in the payment details and proceed with payment. Once payment is done, upload the payment confirmation receipt in the application form. Save a digital copy of the payment receipt for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Depending on the number of applications received, eligible shortlisted candidates will be called for a trade test and/or interview, as applicable to the post. Since it is not possible to call all eligible candidates, shortlisting will be done based on criteria fixed by the Institute at the time of scrutiny. The decision of the Institute regarding shortlisting and selection is final and binding. The notification does not specify separate stages (such as a written exam) beyond trade test and/or interview.

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Recruitment 2026: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Printout of the submitted online application form Copy of the payment receipt/confirmation for the application fee (except for SC/ST/PWD/female applicants) Copies of all requisite/supporting documents (degree, diploma, certificates, experience proof) For several posts, candidates are specifically required to produce evidence of professional work done (e.g., Associate Professor and several Assistant Professor posts); for the Animation Cinema Professor post, candidates must also produce evidence of teaching, case studies, and a portfolio of independent creative samples. Supporting document for experience is required, since experience is counted only after the qualifying degree/diploma/certificate.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SRFTI & FTII Itanagar Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Apply online through the application portal: https://career.srfti.ac.in Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,200/- per post via SBI Collect (except SC/ST/PWD/female candidates) and upload the payment receipt. Complete and submit the online application on or before 03.08.2026, 5:00 PM. Take a printout of the submitted application along with copies of all requisite documents. Send/submit the hard copy so that it reaches the following address on or before 10.08.2026, 5:00 PM: The Registrar, Satyajit Ray Film & Television Institute, EM Bypass Road, Panchasayar, Kolkata – 700094 Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application (and separate fee payment) for each post.

content_sections.heading: SRFTI Recruitment 2026: General Terms & Conditions
content_sections.text: All engagements will initially be for one year, which may be extended further for a maximum of one additional year, subject to satisfactory performance review. The contract is liable to be terminated by either side by giving one month's notice, without assigning any reason. The contractual engagement does not confer any right to regularization or absorption against any post at FTII, Itanagar or SRFTI, Kolkata. The selected candidate will be required to join on an immediate basis. Selected candidates who wish to avail a staff quarter will be charged rent as per their post/category; allotment of staff quarter is subject to availability. The crucial date for reckoning the age limit is the last date fixed for receipt of application, i.e., 03.08.2026. Experience for each post is counted only after the candidate's qualifying degree/diploma/certificate; a supporting document is required. SRFTI states that it strives to have a workforce reflecting gender equality. The Institute reserves the right to reject any/all applications without assigning any reason, and to not fill up any vacancy.

faq.question: Q1. What is SRFTI Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: Satyajit Ray Film & Television Institute (SRFTI), Kolkata has invited applications for 29 contractual posts (31 vacancies) across SRFTI, Kolkata and FTII, Itanagar, ranging from Professor and Associate Professor to Broadcast Engineer, Production Manager, Editor, Sound Recordist, Videographer, and Cameraman.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in SRFTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 29 distinct posts advertised, with a combined total of 31 vacancies, since three posts (Assistant Professor – Writing, Management, and Cinematography for EDM) each have 2 vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the nature of engagement in SPMCIL?
faq.answer: Fixed Term Contract Basis for Young Professionals.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Young Professional (Legal) in SPMCIL?
faq.answer: First class LL.B from a recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the experience required for Cyber Security Young Professional?
faq.answer: Minimum One year post-qualification experience in Cyber Security.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for SPMCIL Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: Apply online through the Career section on www.spmcil.com.

faq.question: Q7. What is the opening date for SPMCIL online application?
faq.answer: Online applications open from 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is SPMCIL Young Professional job permanent?
faq.answer: No. It is on Fixed Term Contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which company is recruiting Young Professionals in 2026?
faq.answer: Security Printing and Minting Corporation of India Ltd. (SPMCIL).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the detailed advertisement for SPMCIL Recruitment?
faq.answer: Visit the official website www.spmcil.com under the Career section.
